description: This document outlines the Socket.io events for the Ticky-API. Use this to integrate real-time game logic, presence, and chat.

flow: 1. Authenticate via REST API to get your JWT token.
2. (Optional) Call GET /api/v1/game/session to check for an existing gameCode.
5. Emit 'joinGame' with a gameCode (either new or from the session check).

registerPlayer.description: Associates your socket connection with your user ID for presence and private messaging.

joinGame.description: Joins a specific game room. If the game doesn't exist, it's created. If you were already in it, you're marked as reconnected.

playerMove.description: Sends a move to the server. Server validates the move, checks for win/draw, and updates state.

sendMessage.description: Sends a chat message. If gameId is provided, it goes to the game room. Otherwise, it's a direct message.

leaveGame.description: Formally leave the current game. Removes the participant from Redis.

endGame.description: Forcefully ends the session for everyone and clears state.

payload.participants: Array<{userId, character, joinedAt, username, avatar_url, xp, total_games, connected}>

playerAssigned.description: Received after joining or reconnecting. Tells you which side you are playing and provides full details for all current players in the room (including your opponent).

payload.players: Array<{userId, character, joinedAt, username, avatar_url, xp, total_games, connected}>

playersUpdated.description: Sent to everyone in the room when someone new joins. Includes full profile data for everyone.

payload.participants: Array<{userId, character, joinedAt, username, avatar_url, xp, total_games, connected}>

playerReconnected.description: Sent when a disconnected player returns. Provides the updated participants list.

boardUpdated.description: Sent after every valid move. Contains the full board state and win/draw status. NOTE: At the end of a round (win/draw), this is emitted twice: once immediately with the final result, and again after 3 seconds with a reset board and new starting player.

gameMessage.description: Received for chat messages within a game room.

playerConnectionIssue.description: Sent when a player's socket disconnects unexpectedly. Starts a 60s forfeit timer.

playerForfeit.description: Sent if a disconnected player fails to return within 60 seconds.

playerLeft.description: Sent when a player explicitly calls the 'leaveGame' event.

gameEnded.description: Sent when the session is cleared (either via 'endGame' call or forfeit or if the game becomes empty).

gameFull.description: Sent if you try to join a room that already has 2 participants.
